blockingIssues.description: seed_data.py contains Lakewood animal-control records with ZIP codes 80214 and 80215, which violate the stated 80226-80232 requirement.
Demo buttons were placed inside #query-form, which is hidden until authentication, so they are not visible on initial page load (fails VAL-FE-002).

appliedUpdates.description: Added operational notes to .factory/library/environment.md documenting deploy.sh stash/pop conflict risk and intermittent SSH reset behavior on rapid retries.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit rule to never print or paste full secrets (API keys, tokens, credentials) in worker outputs, transcripts, or handoffs; require masking except minimal prefix/suffix when verification needs proof.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for fix-config-and-create-datasets found a full OPENROUTER key literal present in worker transcript output.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: For frontend tasks, require verification of initial visibility and state-dependent UI behavior (not only static HTML checks), including at least one interactive assertion when visibility is part of acceptance criteria.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: update-frontend passed static checks but failed VAL-FE-002 because demo buttons were hidden inside an auth-gated container.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document that handlers.collect_data() must use config.DO_SPACES_PREFIX consistently for both metadata and data object keys.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: seed-upload-and-deploy required a production bugfix commit (19dd10e) to correct DO Spaces prefix behavior.
